Name: Hyprstream Monitors
Author: danmaxis
Description: Calm, glanceable system displays for Stream Deck on Linux: clock, CPU, RAM, battery, temperature, and uptime, read straight from /proc and /sys. Color-coded thresholds keep the keys readable at a glance. No Hyprland required.

Actions.Name: Clock
Actions.Tooltip: Live time display. 24h or 12h format with optional seconds and date. Refreshes every second when seconds are shown, otherwise every 30 seconds. Display-only — pressing the key just acknowledges the press, no system action. Works on any Linux setup (no Hyprland required).

Actions.Name: CPU Usage
Actions.Tooltip: System-wide CPU utilization, read from /proc/stat at ~1.5s intervals. Color goes orange past the warn threshold (default 70%) and red past the crit threshold (default 90%). A progress bar at the bottom mirrors the percentage. Display-only. Works on any Linux setup (no Hyprland required).

Actions.Name: RAM Usage
Actions.Tooltip: Memory pressure, read from /proc/meminfo (MemTotal/MemAvailable). Refreshes every 2s. Label shows total RAM in GB when detected. Color thresholds at warn (default 75%) and crit (default 90%). Display-only. Works on any Linux setup.

Actions.Name: Battery
Actions.Tooltip: Laptop battery charge, read from /sys/class/power_supply/BAT*. Auto-detects the first BAT entry; override the name in the property inspector if needed. Shows a charging-bolt glyph when on AC, turns red at/under the warn threshold (default 20%). Refreshes every 30s. Display-only.

Actions.Name: Temperature
Actions.Tooltip: CPU/SoC temperature in °C, read from /sys/class/thermal/<zone>/temp. Default zone is thermal_zone0; switch zones in the PI if your laptop reports the right sensor elsewhere. Color thresholds at warn (75°) and crit (90°). Refreshes every 2s. Display-only.

Actions.Name: Uptime
Actions.Tooltip: System uptime, read from /proc/uptime. Two formats: 'short' (3d4h, 12h34m, 7m) and 'human' (3d 4h). Refreshes every minute. Display-only. Works on any Linux setup.
